items.title: free-claude-code
items.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw
items.description_zh: 在终端、VSCode 扩展中或通过 openclaw 等 Discord 免费使用 claude-code

items.title: skills
items.description: My personal directory of skills, straight from my .claude directory.
items.description_zh: 我的个人技能目录，直接来自我的 .claude 目录。

items.title: hackingtool
items.description: ALL IN ONE Hacking Tool For Hackers
items.description_zh: 黑客的多合一黑客工具

items.title: posthog
items.description: 🦔 PostHog is an all-in-one developer platform for building successful products. We offer product analytics, web analytics, session replay, error tracking, feature flags, experimentation, surveys, data warehouse, a CDP, and an AI product assistant to help debug your code, ship features faster, and keep all your usage and customer data in one stack.
items.description_zh: 🦔 PostHog 是一个用于构建成功产品的一体化开发者平台。我们提供产品分析、网络分析、会话重播、错误跟踪、功能标记、实验、调查、数据仓库、CDP 和 AI 产品助手，以帮助调试您的代码、更快地发布功能，并将您的所有使用情况和客户数据保存在一个堆栈中。

items.title: claude-code-templates
items.description: CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code
items.description_zh: 用于配置和监控 Claude Code 的 CLI 工具

items.title: DeepEP
items.description: DeepEP: an efficient expert-parallel communication library
items.description_zh: DeepEP：高效的专家并行通信库

items.title: PowerShell
items.description_zh: 适用于每个系统的 PowerShell！

items.title: Roo-Code
items.description: Roo Code gives you a whole dev team of AI agents in your code editor.
items.description_zh: Roo Code 在代码编辑器中为您提供了整个 AI 代理开发团队。

items.title: ml-intern
items.description: 🤗 ml-intern: an open-source ML engineer that reads papers, trains models, and ships ML models
items.description_zh: 🤗 ml-intern：开源 ML 工程师，负责阅读论文、训练模型和发布 ML 模型

items.title: build-your-own-x
items.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
items.description_zh: 通过从头开始重新创建您最喜欢的技术来掌握编程。

items.title: ds2api
items.description: Deepseek to API: A lightweight, high-performance full-stack middleware converting client protocols to universal APIs. Supports multi-account rotation, compiled binaries, Vercel Serverless, and Docker. Compatible with Google, Claude, and OpenAI API formats.
items.description_zh: Deepseek to API：一种轻量级、高性能的全栈中间件，可将客户端协议转换为通用 API。支持多账户轮换、编译二进制文件、Vercel Serverless 和 Docker。兼容 Google、Claude 和 OpenAI API 格式。

items.title: ucp
items.description: Specification and documentation for the Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP)
items.description_zh: 通用商业协议 (UCP) 的规范和文档

items.title: awesome-codex-skills
items.description: A curated list of practical Codex skills for automating workflows across the Codex CLI and API.
items.description_zh: 用于跨 Codex CLI 和 API 实现工作流程自动化的实用 Codex 技能精选列表。
